title: European stocks open mixed following U.S. strikes on Iran, mixed messages on peace talks
summary: European stocks opened mixed Tuesday as traders monitored Middle East and Ukraine developments. The uncertainty around U.S.-Iran tensions and conflicting peace signals created volatility in market sentiment.
content: European stocks opened mixed on Tuesday, as traders watched developments in the Middle East and Ukraine.

zh.title: 美国对伊朗的打击后欧洲股市开盘走混，和平谈判信号混合
zh.summary: 欧洲股市周二开盘走混，交易员监测中东和乌克兰局势发展。美国-伊朗紧张局势的不确定性和相互矛盾的和平信号造成了市场情绪的波动。

title: EU plans to fine Google high triple-digit million euro sum, Handelsblatt reports
summary: The EU is planning to impose a massive fine on Google for violating its Digital Markets Act, marking the largest penalty under the legislation designed to rein in big tech's market dominance.
content: The fine would be the largest penalty the EU has imposed for a breach of its Digital Markets Act, which aims to curb the power of big tech companies.

zh.title: 据《商报》报道，欧盟计划对谷歌处以高达三位数百万欧元的罚款
zh.summary: 欧盟计划因谷歌违反《数字市场法》而对其处以巨额罚款，这是该旨在遏制大科技公司市场主导地位的法律下的最大罚款。

title: Ferrari's electric ambitions with the Luce launch
summary: Ferrari unveiled its first fully electric vehicle, the Luce, co-designed with former Apple designer Jony Ive, featuring dual electric motors and 0-100 km/h acceleration in 2.5 seconds. The five-seater marks Ferrari's entry into the electric car market.
content: Ferrari has unveiled its first fully electric car, co-designed by former Apple chief designer Jony Ive. The 'Ferrari Luce' is a five-seater, powered by an electric engine on each wheel - and is able to reach 100 kilometres per hour in just 2-and-a-half seconds. CNBC's Charlotte Reed speaks to the CEO, Benedetto Vigna.

zh.title: 法拉利通过Luce电动车推出展现其电动雄心
zh.summary: 法拉利推出其首款完全电动车型Luce，由前苹果设计师乔尼·艾夫联合设计，配备双电动马达，0-100公里/小时加速时间为2.5秒。这款五座车型标志着法拉利进入电动汽车市场。

title: 'An £8,000 debt pushed me to breaking point'
summary: A Bradford resident shares his struggle with significant personal debt, urging others to seek help when facing financial hardship. His story highlights the psychological toll of debt and the importance of support resources.
content: A Bradford man who has struggled with debt urges others to reach out for help.

zh.title: "一笔8000英镑的债务把我逼到了崩溃的边缘"
zh.summary: 一位布拉德福德居民分享了他与巨额个人债务的斗争，敦促其他人在面临经济困难时寻求帮助。他的故事突出了债务的心理代价和支持资源的重要性。

title: Bank holiday sun boosts South West tourism
summary: Sunny weather during a bank holiday drove a tourism surge in Devon and Cornwall, with business owners crediting favorable conditions for increased customer traffic. The bright conditions demonstrated weather's significant impact on tourism-dependent regional economies.
content: Business owners in Devon and Cornwall describe how "the sun just brings everybody out".

zh.title: 银行假日阳光促进西南地区旅游业
zh.summary: 银行假日期间的晴朗天气促进了德文郡和康沃尔郡的旅游热潮，商业主人将客流增加归功于有利的天气条件。明媚的天气表明了天气对旅游业依赖型地区经济的重大影响。

title: U.S. conducts 'self-defense strikes' in Iran as Trump pushes for peace deal
summary: The U.S. carried out targeted strikes on Iranian military sites including missile facilities and boats attempting to lay mines, even as the Trump administration pursues diplomatic peace negotiations. The military action and diplomatic efforts represent a complex balancing act in U.S.-Iran relations.
content: Targets included missile launch sites and Iranian boats attempting to emplace mines.

zh.title: 特朗普推进和平协议之际，美国在伊朗实施"自卫打击"
zh.summary: 美国对包括导弹设施和试图布设水雷的船只在内的伊朗军事目标进行了精准打击，而特朗普政府同时在进行外交和平谈判。军事行动和外交努力在美伊关系中体现了一种复杂的平衡行为。

title: Ferrari unveils first fully electric car
summary: Ferrari launched its first fully electric vehicle, the Luce model, despite pressure from Chinese EV competitors, though the design generated mixed social media reactions. The move signals traditional luxury automakers adapting to the electric vehicle transition.
content: The new Luce model has divided opinion on social media, and comes despite intense pressure from Chinese EV makers.

zh.title: 法拉利推出首款全电动汽车
zh.summary: 尽管面临中国电动汽车竞争对手的压力，法拉利推出了其首款全电动汽车Luce车型，但该设计在社交媒体上引发了不同的反应。这一举动标志着传统豪华汽车制造商正在适应电动汽车转型。

title: Oil prices mixed as U.S. military strikes against Iran cloud Middle East peace prospects
summary: U.S. military strikes against Iran are creating uncertainty in Middle East peace negotiations and affecting oil prices. The Trump administration says negotiations are proceeding well but warned that military action could resume if talks collapse.
content: Donald Trump also said negotiations with Iran were "proceeding nicely," but cautioned that the U.S. could resume military action if discussions were to collapse.

zh.title: 美国对伊朗军事打击致油价波动，中东和平前景蒙阴
zh.summary: 美国对伊朗的军事打击在中东和平谈判中造成不确定性，影响油价。特朗普政府表示谈判进展顺利，但警告如果谈判破裂，可能恢复军事行动。

title: South Korea's Kospi hits fresh record as hopes of U.S.-Iran breakthrough rise
summary: South Korea's Kospi stock index reached a fresh record as optimism grows around U.S.-Iran peace negotiations. Asia-Pacific markets are broadly higher, driven by investor confidence in a potential diplomatic breakthrough.
content: Asia-Pacific markets were set to open broadly higher Tuesday, amid hopes for a breakthrough in the U.S.-Iran peace negotiations.

zh.title: 美伊突破希望上升，韩国科斯皮指数创下新高
zh.summary: 随着美伊和平谈判乐观情绪增长，韩国科斯皮股票指数创下新高。亚太地区市场普遍上涨，由投资者对潜在外交突破的信心推动。
